scents.name: Beany
scents.definition: The legume-like aromatic note characteristic of unprocessed plant proteins; often described as 'green' or 'raw'.

scents.name: Earthy
scents.definition: Aromatic note evoking damp soil, mushroom, or root vegetables.

scents.name: Meaty
scents.definition: The savory, brothy aromatic core of cooked meat. Drives the recognition that 'this tastes like meat'.

scents.name: Roasted
scents.definition: Maillard-derived browning notes from cooked meat surface.

scents.name: Fatty
scents.definition: The lipid-derived aromatic carrier present in both animal fats and oxidized plant oils.

scents.name: Metallic
scents.definition: Iron-blood aromatic note characteristic of fresh red meat.
